sections.heading: S
sections.section_value: The patient reports high blood sugar, seeing spots, and reports joint pain. He also reports a history of osteoarthritis and has been eating a lot of sweets recently. The patient reports being surrounded by holiday treats. He reports dizziness.

sections.heading: O
sections.section_value: Blood pressure is 118/72 mmHg. Heart rate is 78 bpm. Neurological exam is unremarkable.

sections.heading: A
sections.section_value: The patient has diabetes and experiencing symptoms consistent with it.

sections.heading: P
sections.section_value: Order a complete metabolic panel. Start metformin, 500 milligrams, twice a day. The nurse will teach the patient how to do blood sugar testing using a glucometer.
